description: mdapi Renovate — Lane-B image bumps + ALL Fleet Helm chart versions. Lane-A floating app images stay on Keel. See operator ~/imagepolicy-study/PROPOSAL.md.

packageRules.description: Default OFF — do not touch Lane-A floating image refs (Keel owns them).
Lane-B custom mdapi images — X.Y.Z-mdapi.N versioning (CI mints these). Reviewed by default; minor/major upstream bumps need a human.
Lane-B custom mdapi images — auto-merge the contextless -mdapi.N rebuilds (classified as patch) + digests after CI green. 1-day soak guards against a torn push being auto-deployed.
Lane-B upstream critical: zot. Manual review with release notes + 3-day soak.
Lane-B upstream critical: Technitium DNS. Manual review with release notes + 3-day soak.

Fleet Helm charts: every chart pinned in a fleet.yaml is Renovate-managed. MRs only (no automerge), manual review with a soak window. Bumps the `version:` in the bundle's fleet.yaml; the chart deploys on the next Fleet reconcile after merge.
Fleet Helm chart MAJOR bumps: longer soak + extra-review label. Chart majors routinely carry breaking values/CRD changes, so never fast-track them.
Lane-B: keel Helm chart (Fleet manager). Keel can't reliably self-update, so Renovate owns its chart-version bumps. Manual review + 3-day soak.
Lane-B upstream stock: nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged (showcase + cert-host static serving). Pinned tag, Renovate-owned (not Keel). Manual review + 3-day soak.
Lane-B: Lowcoder CE app images (api/node/frontend) — version-coupled, bump all three to the same tag together. Pinned, Renovate-owned. Manual review + 3-day soak.

hostRules.description: Read private mdapi registry tags. Credentials injected at runtime via RENOVATE_HOST_RULES (NOT committed).
